performance.measurement_note: Option prices are observed snapshots. Underlying target/stop order uses five-minute OHLC bars; same-bar touches remain ambiguous and are not wins.

disclaimer: وضع Swing بحثي مبني على بيانات مجانية قد تكون متأخرة أو ناقصة. النتائج المسجلة أسعار مرصودة وليست تنفيذات مؤكدة، ولا يوجد ضمان للربح. المشروع يعرض النتائج داخل الصفحة فقط ولا يرسل بريدًا أو رسائل خارجية. تحقق من السعر الحي قبل أي أمر.

treasury.source: U.S. Treasury Daily Interest Rate XML Feed

services.name: options_data
services.note: Auto mode merges configured Tradier and MarketData option chains and fills missing fields from Yahoo; Alpaca can enrich quotes and Greeks.

services.name: hybrid_price_bars
services.note: Configured official/free-account bar sources: none; Yahoo fallback active. Intraday path tracking uses the first successful provider.

services.name: path_order_tracking
services.note: Five-minute underlying OHLC bars record target-first, stop-first, or ambiguous same-bar outcomes.

services.name: sec_identity
services.note: SEC automated access uses a descriptive User-Agent and fair-access limits.

services.name: sec_company_facts
services.note: Official SEC XBRL Company Facts enrich the highest-ranked stocks with revenue, earnings, cash, assets and operating cash flow.

services.name: treasury_yield_curve
services.note: Official U.S. Treasury XML feed supplies 3m, 2y, 10y and 30y yields without an API key.

services.name: fred_macro
services.note: Optional free FRED key not configured; Treasury macro data remains active.

services.name: openfda
services.note: openFDA works without a key within the public limit; a free key is optional.

services.name: evidence_journal
services.note: Signals, observations and calibration evidence are persisted by GitHub Actions.

operational_status.operation_note: The project publishes only to the dashboard and GitHub evidence journal. External message delivery and automated order execution are disabled.
